bugs.title: Creating new company address via Ship To 'Add new' fails with 'Something went wrong'
bugs.steps: 1. Click Ship To selector in header. 2. Click 'Add new'. 3. Fill form: Country=US, State=Illinois, ZIP=62701, City=Springfield, Address=456 New St. 4. Click Save.
bugs.expected: Address saved successfully and appears in address list
bugs.actual: Error toast: 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' Address not saved. Reproducible on retry.
bugs.notes: GraphQL calls return 200 status but likely contain errors[] in response body. Company address form lacks Name/Phone fields (different from personal address form).

bugs.title: Org switcher search does not filter dynamically while typing
bugs.steps: 1. Open Account menu. 2. Type 'cof' in Organizations search box. 3. Observe list.
bugs.expected: List filters dynamically as user types, showing only matching orgs
bugs.actual: List does not filter on type. User must click the search icon button to execute the search. After clicking, filtering works correctly (shows 'Coffee shop').
bugs.notes: UX issue rather than functional bug. Search works when explicitly triggered via search button click.

knownBugs.title: Variation section type renders empty radiogroup
knownBugs.reference: Known bug documented in products.md - Variation sections on 'Bike with options' and 'Off-Road Bike' render empty

knownBugs.title: Variation section type renders empty on Off-Road Bike (2 sections)

results.title: Variation Selector Display
results.notes: Variation selector displays correctly with color/size options. Tested in previous session.

results.title: Variation Selection Updates Price and Image
results.notes: Lower priority - covered partially by VAR-001 testing

results.title: Invalid Variation Combinations
results.notes: Deferred - requires specific product with incompatible combos

results.title: Variation URL Updates
results.notes: Deferred

results.title: Variation Out of Stock Handling
results.notes: Deferred - requires OOS variant data

results.title: Variation Selector Mobile Rendering
results.notes: Mobile tested for CONFIG-011 instead

results.title: Variation - From Price Display
results.notes: Deferred

results.title: Lists Page Accessible
results.notes: Lists page at /account/lists loads successfully showing 8 existing lists

results.title: Create New List
results.notes: Created 'QA Regression Test List' with description and sharing options (Private/Shared). List created successfully.

results.title: Ship To - View Saved Addresses
results.notes: Addresses viewable via Ship To header dropdown (2 addresses) and Company info page table. Table shows Address, Country, ZIP, Description, Default, Actions columns.

results.title: Ship To - Add New Address
results.notes: BUG: 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' error on save. Form filled correctly: US, IL, 62701, Springfield, 456 New St. Reproducible. See B2C-SHIP-002-save-error.png.

results.title: Ship To - Edit Address
results.notes: Edit option available via Actions menu on Company info addresses table. Not fully tested (edit flow) due to SHIP-002 save failure risk.

results.title: Ship To - Delete Address
results.notes: Delete option available via Actions menu. Not executed to avoid removing test data.

results.title: Ship To - Set Default Address
results.notes: 'Mark as favorite' option available in Actions menu. Star icons visible per address row.

results.title: Ship To - Header Selector/Dropdown
results.notes: Ship To selector visible in header showing current address. Clicking opens dropdown with 'Select address' heading, address list, and 'Add new' button. Switching addresses updates header immediately.

results.title: Ship To - International Address Support
results.notes: Country selector shows full international list. State/Province field dynamically enables and updates options based on country (tested US states). Required field marker appears.

results.title: Product Configuration - Configurable Options
results.notes: Off-Road Bike: accordion sections display, radio options selectable, configuration added to cart successfully.

results.title: Product Configuration - Price Calculation Accuracy
results.notes: Off-Road Bike Engine option: sale price $35 displayed with list price $55 strikethrough. Price modifiers apply correctly.

results.title: Product Configuration - Mobile Configuration UI
results.notes: Configurable Hat on 375x667: accordion sections responsive, radio buttons tappable, images visible, prices shown, no horizontal scroll. Full-width layout.

results.title: Configurable Product - Sale Price Displayed as Primary
results.notes: Sale price shown prominently, list price with strikethrough. VCST-4586 regression not recurring.

results.title: No Auto-Scroll on First Collapsed Section Click (VCST-4612)
results.notes: Bike with options: scroll position (505) unchanged after expanding collapsed 'Test' section. VCST-4612 regression not recurring.

results.title: Radio Selection Sticks (VCST-4612)
results.notes: Selected 'new' radio option in Test section, waited 2s - selection persisted. No revert bug.

results.title: Variation Section - Renders Options (Bike with options)
results.notes: Known bug: 'Choose your bike variant' Variation section renders empty radiogroup.

results.title: Variation Section - Renders Options (Off-Road Bike)
results.notes: Known bug: Both Variation sections on Off-Road Bike render empty.

results.title: Org Switcher Visibility
results.notes: Account menu shows 'Organizations' section with 30+ orgs listed. Current org (Bence and Family) shown with checked radio.

results.title: Switch Org - Pricing Update
results.notes: Switching from 'Bence and Family' to 'Coffee shop' updates theme/logo (white labeling), cart count changes (3 vs 102 items), ship-to address changes.

results.title: Switch Org - Cart Isolation
results.notes: Cart isolation confirmed: Bence and Family has 3 items, Coffee shop has 102 items. Switching does not contaminate carts. BL-B2B-005 verified.

results.title: Search Orgs in Switcher
results.notes: UX BUG: Search does not filter dynamically while typing. Requires explicit search button click. After click, filtering works correctly ('cof' shows Coffee shop). See B2C-ORG-007-search-not-filtering.png.

results.title: Switch Back - Cart Intact
results.notes: Switching to Coffee shop and back to Bence and Family preserves original 3-item cart.

results.title: Quick Order by SKU
results.notes: Bulk order page at /bulk-order loads. Two tabs: 'Copy&Paste' and 'Manually'. SKU entry interface present.

results.title: Dashboard Accessible
results.notes: Dashboard at /account/dashboard loads successfully.

results.title: Dashboard - Latest Orders and Monthly Spend
results.notes: Latest orders table and monthly spend report section visible on dashboard.

results.title: Notifications Page Accessible
results.notes: Notifications page at /account/notifications loads. Shows 17 items with pagination.

results.title: Notifications Display with Timestamps
results.notes: Notifications display with timestamps, read/unread state indicators.

results.title: Back-in-Stock Page Accessible
results.notes: Back-in-stock list at /account/back-in-stock loads. Shows empty state (no items currently tracked).

results.title: Points History Page
results.notes: Points history at /account/points-history shows Balance: 20, table with 4 'Earned' entries of 5 points each from 4 orders.

environmentNotes.consoleErrors: jensen.json 404 on every page load (known environmental issue). Product image 404s for some items.
environmentNotes.knownIssues: Variation section type renders empty (documented). Test Bike With Options product returns 404.
environmentNotes.websocket: WebSocket connections established successfully on each page load.

actions.notes: List deleted via Lists page actions menu. Confirmed removed from sidebar (8 lists remaining).
Cart reduced from 3 items to 2 items. Pre-existing items (Portable Camcorder, Mini Digital Camera) preserved. Cart total updated to $419.98.

skipped: No test accounts created during this run (used existing multi-org account: Bence and Family / Elena Mutykova)
No company addresses created (B2C-SHIP-002 address save failed, so no cleanup needed)
